tools.name: mysql_query
tools.description: Execute a MySQL SQL query. Read-only (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE blocked). Use SELECT against mysql.slow_log / performance_schema / information_schema / dbaops_* tables. EXPLAIN: this server's parser accepts only `EXPLAIN <SELECT|WITH>` — `EXPLAIN ANALYZE`, `EXPLAIN FORMAT=TREE/JSON` are rejected. For ANALYZE-style timings, query performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest (sum_timer_wait, rows_examined, sum_no_index_used) instead.
